/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=gnu++17 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libw2xc.so -o libw2xc.so CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/modelHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/modelHandler_neon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/modelHandler_OpenCL.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/convertRoutine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/threadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/modelHandler_CUDA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/w2xconv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/cvwrap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/Env.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/w2xc.dir/src/tstring.cpp.o  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.10.0 -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.10.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.10.0
